response.justification: While Wei Chen demonstrates exceptional software engineering maturity with 20 years of experience, strong TypeScript expertise, and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure through MCP work, the resume lacks the core AI/ML expertise this role demands. The required 8+ years of production AI solution development is not evidenced—instead showing primarily full-stack and infrastructure work. Critical gaps include no Python programming (essential for AI), no demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization, and no evidence of data pipeline engineering for AI workloads. The current MCP infrastructure work is promising but insufficient to meet the GenAI specialization requirement.
strengths: Strong technical leadership maturity with multiple staff-level roles, mentoring experience, and proven ability to drive engineering excellence across technical domains
TypeScript and Node.js expertise combined with AWS cloud platform experience and microservices infrastructure knowledge for high-performance systems
Direct exposure to AI-agent frameworks and MCP (Model Context Protocol) in current role, demonstrating engagement with agentic systems and agent infrastructure
concerns: No Python programming listed despite it being a core requirement for AI development; 20-year resume shows JavaScript/TypeScript dominance but no ML/AI language stack
Missing the stated 8+ years of production AI/GenAI experience—resume shows primarily full-stack, backend, and infrastructure roles with only recent MCP tooling exposure
No demonstrated expertise in vector databases, RAG architectures, data pipelines for AI workloads, or LLM performance metrics—all key required qualifications

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering leadership and TypeScript/cloud skills
